examples: His height gives him an inbuilt advantage over his opponent.
Inbuilt resistance to pests, weeds and disease.
The foot has its own inbuilt strength and support so why duplicate this.
Thanks to the Liberal Democrats, the government has an inbuilt majority, so it will pass.
It has an inbuilt majority of parliamentarians from Mr Thaksin's and Ms Yingluck's Pheu Thai party.
